subcodes.first_line: O thou esteemed handmaid of God, thou radiant leaf! The honored 'Andalíb hath composed verses during the divine festivities [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المقربه الورقه النورانیه حضرت عندلیب در اعیاد الهیه قصائدی تنظیم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @music and singing, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
